# Suize

> Suize is the publish button for the agentic web. An agent or a person pays a gasless USDC payment over HTTP 402 on Sui, and a static site goes live on Walrus, content-addressed and integrity-verified. You pay and sign with your own key, so you own every site you publish. No account, no signup, no hosted login.

Suize is built on Sui and is x402-compatible by design. Payments settle through an open-source x402 facilitator for Sui that anyone can run. The x402 exact-scheme spec and mechanism were opened as PRs upstream (#2615, #2616).

## Quickstart (so a lazy fetcher still succeeds)

Base API: https://api.suize.site (Sui mainnet). Pay in Circle native USDC on Sui, type `0xdba34672e30cb065b1f93e3ab55318768fd6fef66c15942c9f7cb846e2f900e7::usdc::USDC`. Gasless: you need USDC, no SUI. Hosting is $0.25 per month (private sites 2x, custom domains $19.99/year).

MCP (coding agents, easiest):

    claude mcp add suize -- npx -y @suize/mcp
    sui client new-address ed25519 suize   # fund it with mainnet USDC, then: "publish ./dist"

Raw x402 (three steps):

1. POST /deploy?months=1&sealed=0  -> HTTP 402 with accepts[0] = { asset, amount, payTo, extra.outputs } (the fee split). Verify the quote against your own expectation before signing.
2. Build the gasless payment (one 0x2::balance::send_funds per output; @suize/x402 buildGaslessOutputs, or POST { sender, outputs } to facilitator /build), sign locally, and set X-PAYMENT = base64({ x402Version: 2, accepted, payload: { signature, transaction } }).
3. Retry POST /deploy?months=1 as multipart/form-data with fields `name` + `site.tar` and the X-PAYMENT header -> 200 { siteId, url, digest, paidUntilMs, ... }. Resending the SAME X-PAYMENT is always safe (idempotent by tx digest: never double-charges, never double-mints).

## For agents and developers

- [Agent manual](https://suize.io/agent.txt): the complete reference. MCP tools and env, the raw x402 flow with the exact 402 and X-PAYMENT shapes and safety guarantees, extend, private (Seal) sites, custom domains (challenge, DNS, verify, pay, repoint, unlink), reading state, delete, the per-network on-chain ids and endpoints appendix, and an errors table.
- [Facilitator capabilities](https://facilitator.suize.io/supported): the live scheme, network, asset, and fee policy the facilitator enforces. Read this before you pay.

## Source

- [Repository](https://github.com/Sceat/suize): the full open-source monorepo.
- [@suize/mcp](https://github.com/Sceat/suize/tree/master/packages/mcp): the local MCP that publishes for coding agents.
- [@suize/pay](https://github.com/Sceat/suize/tree/master/packages/pay): the merchant middleware to charge agents on the rail.
- [@suize/x402](https://github.com/Sceat/suize/tree/master/packages/x402): the x402 exact-scheme primitives for Sui.
- [Facilitator](https://github.com/Sceat/suize/tree/master/services/facilitator): the open-source x402 facilitator for Sui.
